data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Epic B migration COMPLETE + shipped: all 10 deliverable children signed-closed (B1/B2/B3/B4/B5/B6/B-DM/B-UX/B-RETIRE + tepid-bus-pomp fix); B-RETIRE merged (#50) — workflow is the sole plan-review+completion gate (bespoke run_review + B4 harness + gate_engine flag removed). The 2 open children (super-plant-liver root-cause bug, toy-kink-ire metrics task) are FOLLOW-UP work, not migration deliverables; re-homing reverts due to a concurrent store writer (reconciler re-applying the Jira epic-link), so --force. Follow-ups remain open + tracked.". Session: f7d12b43.
